name: spir
description: SPIR: Specify → Plan → Implement → Review. Project-local override: this is a Python/uv repo (package in jaleesbench/; the SPIR browser app lives in apps/jaleesbrowser/), so the npm-hardwired implement checks + phase_completion are pointed at uv/pytest. The TS app's build + Vitest are verified by the app's own acceptance criteria and the Pages CI; per-plan-phase timing means the app may not exist during early plan phases, so porch gates on the Python side here.

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Implement code with 3-way review per plan phase

tests.description: Python tests (uv/pytest). The TS app build + Vitest run via the app's acceptance criteria + Pages CI; the app may not exist in early plan phases, so porch gates on the Python side.

phases.name: Review
phases.description: Final review and PR with 3-way review

pr_exists.command: gh pr list --state all --head "$(git branch --show-current)" --json number --jq 'length' | grep -q '^[1-9]'
pr_exists.description: PR must be created before signaling completion

review_has_arch_updates.description: Review must include '## Architecture Updates' section (what changed in arch.md, or why no changes needed)

review_has_lessons_updates.description: Review must include '## Lessons Learned Updates' section (what changed in lessons-learned.md, or why no changes needed)

e2e_tests.command: echo 'no e2e suite configured for this repo'
e2e_tests.description: No end-to-end suite in this repo

phases.name: Verify
phases.description: Post-merge environmental verification (optional — skip with porch verify --skip)

PHASE_COMPLETE.description: Signal current build phase is complete
